gaz.name: Refrigerant gases
gaz.short: R410A, R32, R134a, residual R22 — cylinders from 1 kg to 13.6 kg.
gaz.desc: Refrigerant fluids in original cylinders, stored under safe and compliant conditions. Sizes from quick fixes to large installations.

pieces.name: Spare parts
pieces.short: Compressors, condensers, filter driers, expansion valves, fans.
pieces.desc: The wear parts and essential components to repair and restore air conditioners, cold rooms and refrigerated display cases.

outillage.name: Professional tools
outillage.short: Manifolds, vacuum pumps, leak detectors, recovery stations, charging scales.
outillage.desc: The technician's equipment, chosen to last in the field. Reliable brands, after-sales support included.

consommables.name: Consumables & installation
consommables.short: Brazing rods, flux, mounting brackets, installation kits.
consommables.desc: All the consumables that run out fast on the job: brazing, flux, brackets and complete installation kits.

about.title: A refrigeration supplier built by and for the trade
about.lead: CoolTrade Sénégal is an import-distribution company based in Dakar, dedicated to refrigeration and air-conditioning professionals. Our job: making sure you're never short of the refrigerant or the part your work site needs.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.desc: To make sourcing refrigerant gases, parts and tools simple, fast and reliable for Senegalese technicians — with honest technical advice and deadlines we keep.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.desc: To become the reference partner of Senegal's refrigeration industry, supporting the transition to more environmentally friendly refrigerants such as R32.

founder.title: A word from the founder
founder.quote: I started CoolTrade because too many technicians lose entire days hunting for a cylinder or a part. Our promise is simple: stock on hand, professional-to-professional advice, and deadlines we keep. Your success in the field is ours.
founder.name: Abdoul Lahad Niang

r32.title: Why R32 matters
r32.p1: The refrigeration sector is changing. Under the Kigali Amendment, high climate-impact refrigerants (like R410A) are gradually being replaced by cleaner alternatives. R32 is today's benchmark: same range of use, a much lower carbon footprint.
r32.p2: In practice, for you, that means more efficient, longer-lasting installations — but also new handling rules. We support you through this shift: refrigerant choice, safety, and the right habits in the field.
r32.whatsappMessage: Hello, I'd like advice on the transition to R32.

stock.title: Stock that's really available
stock.desc: We don't sell what we don't have. Availability confirmed before you make the trip.

proximity.title: Proximity
proximity.desc: A contact who knows your trade and responds fast, on WhatsApp or at the depot.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.desc: Original refrigerants, secure storage, and support with new regulations.

terms.desc: Volume pricing and trade credit for regular accounts.

services.title: Much more than a cylinder supplier

consulting.title: Technical advice & compliance
consulting.desc: Choosing the right refrigerant for each installation, help with compliance and the R32 transition. We answer the real questions from the field.

training.title: Safe-handling training
training.desc: Short sessions on the safe handling of refrigerants, recovery and best practices. For you and your teams.

aftersales.title: Parts & after-sales support
aftersales.desc: Identifying the right part, fast availability and follow-up. We help you find the exact reference — even from a simple photo.

credit.desc: For regular professionals, an account with 30-day payment terms to finance your projects without straining cash flow.
